description: Bank alerts, UPI payments, credit card transactions, EMI debits, mandates, refunds
classificationPrompt: Classify as FinancialTransaction if the email is about money movement — debits, credits, refunds, reversals, mandates, subscriptions, EMIs, salary credits, or any bank/payment app notification about a financial transaction. Includes UPI, NEFT, IMPS, credit card statements, loan EMIs, and e-mandate registrations.

mandatory.transactionType: one of: debit, credit, refund, reversal, emi, mandate, subscription
mandatory.transactionDateTime: ISO 8601 format (use email date if transaction date not stated)

optional.accountNumber: masked account/card number as shown in email
optional.category: food, travel, subscription, utility, transfer, salary, investment, insurance, loan, other
